adjudications.key: effect|execute.serivce.ExecuteServiceImpl|effect|callsProvider|ts-order-service order status update (/api/v1/orderservice/order/status/{orderId}/{status}) and order get (/api/v1/orderservice/order/{orderId}) endpoints via RestTemplate
adjudications.basis: Reread ts-execute-service/src/main/java/execute/serivce/ExecuteServiceImpl.java:136-146 (executeOrder) and :163-174 (getOrderByIdFromOrder) — both hit ts-order-service via restTemplate.exchange. ticketExecute/ticketCollect call getOrderByIdFromOrder first and only fall back to the order-other-service pair when its status != 1 (lines 45-64), so this is a conditional/restriction-shaped call, not an unconditional one. Reclassified axis from pass-a's 'effect:callsProvider' to 'relation:calls' with axis 'restriction' (matches this repo's precedent for branch-selected provider calls, see chunk-02 adjudication). Merged with pass-b's relation row.

Reread ts-execute-service/src/main/java/execute/serivce/ExecuteServiceImpl.java:140,167 — confirmed calls to ts-order-service. Axis corrected to 'restriction' since the call is the first branch of a try-order-service-then-order-other-service fallback (see pass-a basis). Merged.

adjudications.key: effect|execute.serivce.ExecuteServiceImpl|effect|callsProvider|ts-order-other-service orderOther status update (/api/v1/orderOtherService/orderOther/status/{orderId}/{status}) and orderOther get (/api/v1/orderOtherService/orderOther/{orderId}) endpoints via RestTemplate
